Dashboard Archive: 2026-05-14 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker-Long Today's data shows two exceptional long-term performers dominating the momentum rankings. AGX ranks #1 with a score of 95.7, displaying extraordinary consistency across all timeframes: 322% return over 1 year, 1,374% over 5 years, and 2,090% over 10 years, while maintaining all four SMA signals (30/50/100/200-day). LINC follows with similarly impressive numbers but a notably different trajectory—its 1-year return of 147% lags its 6-month return of 145%, suggesting recent momentum has plateaued, though its 10-year return of 2,515% represents the stronger multi-decade performer of the two. Both tickers pass 4 out of 4 ratio thresholds and outperform SPY significantly across 1-year, 5-year, and 10-year periods, with AGX's "strong_buy" flag and "clean" momentum signal indicating sustained upward movement. The data reflects securities with exceptional historical performance and strong technical positioning, though AGX's more consistent acceleration across all periods distinguishes it as the current top-ranked candidate in this long-term momentum universe.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
